text: Being here, I feel a gentle hum of anticipation and curiosity. The first scene presents a modern, minimalist meeting space behind glass walls—orderly, ready for ideas or discussions to unfold. The second scene draws me into an immersive environment of learning and innovation, washed in blues and oranges, with references to research, humanity, and connection. The thoughtful words on the wall make me feel introspective yet connected to the ongoing human quest for meaning. I feel both small and included in something larger—an experiment in togetherness, creativity, and reflective progress.
